mapper.sql: id, invoice_no, delivery_no, order_no, item_no, order_fno, model_no, quantity, barcode, customer_no, user_no, ship_date, express_no, express_company, warehouse_code, price, opt_code, corder_no, cmodel_no, case_no, weight, order_type, invoice_flag, invoice_time, sign_time, stock_code, dlv_date, orOrderNo, sign_status, sender, dlv_site, volume, box_type, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user, dept_no, sign_order_no, dlv_address, ContactPsn, end_user, email, branch_flag
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.expdetail
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.expdetail (id, invoice_no, delivery_no, order_no, item_no, order_fno, model_no, quantity, barcode, customer_no, user_no, ship_date, express_no, express_company, warehouse_code, price, opt_code, corder_no, cmodel_no, case_no, weight, order_type, invoice_flag, invoice_time, sign_time, stock_code, dlv_date, orOrderNo, sign_status, sender, dlv_site, volume, box_type, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user, dept_no, sign_order_no, dlv_address, ContactPsn, end_user, email, branch_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deliveryNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{expressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expressCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{optCode,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{corderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmodelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{orderType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{invoiceFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{invoiceTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{signTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{ororderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{signStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{sender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvSite,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{volume,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{boxType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{signOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvAddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{contactpsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{branchFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into dbo.expdetail
id,
invoice_no,
delivery_no,
order_no,
item_no,
order_fno,
model_no,
quantity,
barcode,
customer_no,
user_no,
ship_date,

express_company,
warehouse_code,

opt_code,
corder_no,
cmodel_no,
case_no,
weight,
order_type,
invoice_flag,
invoice_time,
sign_time,
stock_code,
dlv_date,
orOrderNo,
sign_status,
sender,
dlv_site,
volume,
box_type,
create_time,
create_user,
update_time,
update_user,
dept_no,
sign_order_no,
dlv_address,
ContactPsn,
end_user,
email,
branch_flag,

mapper.update:
update dbo.expdetail
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delivery_no = #{record.deliveryNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
order_fno = #{record.orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
barcode = #{record.barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ship_date = #{record.shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
express_no = #{record.expressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
express_company = #{record.expressCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
opt_code = #{record.optCode,jdbcType=INTEGER},
corder_no = #{record.corderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cmodel_no = #{record.cmodelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
case_no = #{record.caseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
invoice_flag = #{record.invoiceFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
invoice_time = #{record.invoiceTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
sign_time = #{record.signTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
stock_code = #{record.stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dlv_date = #{record.dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
orOrderNo = #{record.ororderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sign_status = #{record.signStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
sender = #{record.sender,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dlv_site = #{record.dlvSite,jdbcType=CHAR},
volume = #{record.volume,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
box_type = #{record.boxType,jdbcType=CHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_no = #{record.deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sign_order_no = #{record.signOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dlv_address = #{record.dlvAddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ContactPsn = #{record.contactpsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
end_user = #{record.endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{record.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
branch_flag = #{record.branchFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update dbo.expdetail
invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delivery_no = #{deliveryNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
order_fno = #{orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
barcode = #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ship_date = #{shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
express_no = #{expressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
express_company = #{expressCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
opt_code = #{optCode,jdbcType=INTEGER},
corder_no = #{corderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cmodel_no = #{cmodelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
case_no = #{caseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
invoice_flag = #{invoiceFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
invoice_time = #{invoiceTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
sign_time = #{signTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
stock_code = #{stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dlv_date = #{dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
orOrderNo = #{ororderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sign_status = #{signStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
sender = #{sender,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dlv_site = #{dlvSite,jdbcType=CHAR},
volume = #{volume,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
box_type = #{boxType,jdbcType=CHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_no = #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sign_order_no = #{signOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dlv_address = #{dlvAddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ContactPsn = #{contactpsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
end_user = #{endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
branch_flag = #{branchFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.expdetail set invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delivery_no = #{deliveryNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, order_fno = #{orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, barcode = #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ship_date = #{shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, express_no = #{expressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, express_company = #{expressCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, opt_code = #{optCode,jdbcType=INTEGER}, corder_no = #{corderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cmodel_no = #{cmodelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, case_no = #{caseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, invoice_flag = #{invoiceFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, invoice_time = #{invoiceTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, sign_time = #{signTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, stock_code = #{stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dlv_date = #{dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, orOrderNo = #{ororderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sign_status = #{signStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, sender = #{sender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dlv_site = #{dlvSite,jdbcType=CHAR}, volume = #{volume,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, box_type = #{boxType,jdbcType=CHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_no = #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sign_order_no = #{signOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dlv_address = #{dlvAddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ContactPsn = #{contactpsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, end_user = #{endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, branch_flag = #{branchFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
